# uapi_package_feed (Resource)

A package feed (apk repository). The feeds endpoint has no update, so changing name or url replaces the resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uapi_package_feed" "custom" {
  name = "custom"
  url  = "https://downloads.example.org/packages"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Feed name (^[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+$); becomes <name>.list.
- `url` (String) HTTP(S) URL of the package repository.

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the feed is enabled.
- `filename` (String) Feed list filename on the router.
- `id` (String) Stable resource id assigned by uapi (a prefixed ULID).
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the underlying uci section is uapi-managed.
- `update_status` (String) Status of the last feed update.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# A package feed is imported by its id.
terraform import uapi_package_feed.custom f_01HX0000000000000000000000
```
